heading_content_part: CoverMe Privacy Policy - Secure Texting & Phone Calls with Private Vaults for Protecting Personal Contacts, Photos & VideosHomeGet CovermeSupportBlogGet it for FreeFAQBlogPrivacy PolicyThe coverme.ws website (the "Website" or "CoverMe Website") and CoverMe mobile applications (the "Software" or "CoverMe Software") are owned and operated by Airbit Communication Limited("CoverMe", "us" or "we"). It is CoverMe's policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect while operating our websites and CoverMe Software.
Information We Collect(1) Like most website operators, CoverMe colle

cts non-personally-identifying information of the sort that web browsers and servers typically make available, such as the browser type, language preference, referring site, and the date and time of each visitor request. CoverMe's purpose in collecting non-personally identifying information is to better understand how CoverMe's visitors use its website. From time to time, CoverMe may release non-personally-identifying information in the aggregate, e.g., by publishing a report on trends in the usage of its website.
(2) CoverMe also colle
cts potentially personally identifying information like Internet Protocol (IP) addresses and email addresses from users who post feedback or report an issue on its website.(3) CoverMe colle

cts cellular telephone information such as the mobile device ID, device name, OS name and version and IP address to make certain CoverMe functions work.(4) When you use CoverMe to send a multimedia message (such as sharing a photo or sharing a video clip), an encrypted copy of the multimedia content will be cached in CoverMe servers for increased performance. The cached content will be removed after a certain period of months; CoverMe does not provide any means for you to delete the cached content manually. This encrypted content cannot be read by anyone without the decryption key so your privacy is retained throughout the life of the cached data.

decoder_heading: (5) Calls and texts through CoverMe phone numbers
ident_heading: (5) Calls and texts through CoverMe phone numbers
heading_content_part: (5) Calls and texts through CoverMe phone numbers are terminated or originated by third parties. Calls and texts travel through third parties networks in clear text without encryption. The third parties have rights to monitor your calls and texts. CoverMe holds the records of calls and texts through CoverMe phone numbers for a certain period of time.(6) CoverMe may coll

heading_content_part: ect statistics about the behavior of visitors to its websites or CoverMe Software users. CoverMe may display this information publicly or provide it to others.

(7) Contacts information. CoverMe requires access to contacts information from your device with your permission when you choose to use contacts-related features, like when you decide to make calls, send texts to your contacts or share contact with your CoverMe friend. The contacts information will be sent off device when you share contact with your CoverMe friend. If you are concerned about the privacy of your contacts information, we recommend you do not use this feature.

(8) Location Information. CoverMe requires access to location information from your device with your permission when you share your location with your contacts. The location information will be sent off your device when you share your location with your contacts. If you are concerned about the privacy of your contacts information, we recommend you do not use this feature.

(9) Cookie and Tracking A cookie is a string of information that a website places on a visitor's computer. The visitor's browser provides the stored information to the website each time the visitor returns. CoverMe uses cookies to help CoverMe identify and track visitors, their usage of CoverMe websites, and their website access preferences. CoverMe visitors who do not wish to have cookies placed on their computers should set their browsers to refuse cookies before using CoverMe's websites. Certain features of the CoverMe website may not function properly without the aid of cookies.

Information Sharing and Disclosure

decoder_heading: CoverMe does not disclose personally-identifying information
ident_heading: CoverMe does not disclose personally-identifying information
heading_content_part: CoverMe does not disclose personally-identifying information other than as described below.

decoder_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
ident_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
heading_content_part: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information only to company employees, contractors and affiliated organizations that:1.Need to know that information in order to process it on CoverMe's behalf or to provide services available at CoverMe's websites or CoverMe Software, and2.That have agreed not to disclose it to others

decoder_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
ident_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
heading_content_part: Some of those employees, contractors and affiliated organizations may be located outside of your home country; by using CoverMe's websites or CoverMe Software, you consent to the transfer of such information to them. CoverMe will not rent or sell potential or definitive personally-identifying information to anyone other than to employees, contractors and affiliated organizations as described above.

decoder_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
ident_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
heading_content_part: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information only in response to a subpoena, court order or other governmental request, or when CoverMe believes in good faith that disclosure is reasonably necessary to protect the property or rights of CoverMe, third parties or the public at large.

decoder_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
ident_heading: CoverMe discloses potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information
heading_content_part: If you are a registered user of a CoverMe website and have supplied your email address, CoverMe may occasionally send you an email to tell you about new features, solicit your feedback, or just keep you up to date with what's going on with CoverMe and our products. We expect to keep this type of email to a minimum.

heading_content_part: If you are a CoverMe Software user, CoverMe may occasionally send you Push Notification to tell you about new features, solicit your feedback, or just keep you up to date with what's going on with CoverMe and our products.If you send us a request (for example via a support email or via one of our feedback mechanisms), we reserve the right to publish it in order to help us clarify or respond to your request or to help us support other users. CoverMe takes all measures reasonably necessary to protect against the unauthorized access, use, alteration or destruction of potentially personally-identifying and personally-identifying information.

Business TransfersIf CoverMe, or substantially all of its assets, were acquired—or in the unlikely event that CoverMe goes out of business or enters bankruptcy—user information would be one of the assets that would be transferred or acquired by a third party. You acknowledge that such transfers may occur, and that any acquirer of CoverMe may continue to use your personal information as set forth in this policy.
Link to Ads

Ads appearing on any of our websites or software may be delivered to users by advertising partners, who may set cookies. These cookies allow the ad server to recognize your device each time they send you an online advertisement and to compile information about you, or others who use your device. This information allows ad networks to—among other things—deliver targeted advertisements that they believe will be of interest to you. This Privacy Policy covers the use of cookies by CoverMe and does not cover the use of cookies by any advertisers.

Children's Personal InformationAll CoverMe services and websites are not intended for children under the age of 13. Children under the age of 13 should not use them at any time.CoverMe does not knowingly collect any information from children under the age of 13. In the event that we learn that we have collected personal information from a child under age 13 without parental consent, CoverMe will promptly delete such personal information in a secure manner.
International Data Transfers

We may need to transfer your information to other CoverMe Groups or service providers in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA). The EEA consists of countries in the European Union, Switzerland, Iceland, Liechtenstein and Norway: they are considered to have equivalent laws when it comes to data protection and privacy. This kind of data transfer may happen if our servers (i.e. where we store data) or our suppliers and service providers are based outside the EEA, or if you use our services and products while visiting countries outside this area.

If CoverMe sends your information to a country that is not in the EEA, we will make sure that your information is properly protected. We will always ensure that there is a proper legal agreement that covers the data transfer. In addition, if the country is not considered to have laws that are equivalent to EU data protection standards then we will ask the third party to enter into a legal agreement that reflects those standards.

decoder_heading: How Long We Keep Your Personal Information
ident_heading: How Long We Keep Your Personal Information
heading_content_part: How Long We Keep Your Personal InformationWe’ll store your information for as long as we have to by law. If there’s no legal requirement, we’ll only store it for as long as we need to. We’re required by law to keep certain personal information about how you use our services for 12 months.

Privacy Policy ChangesCoverMe may change its Privacy Policy from time to time, and at CoverMe's sole discretion. CoverMe encourages visitors or users to frequently check this page for any changes to its Privacy Policy. Your continued access to the Website or use of the Software after any change in this Privacy Policy will constitute your acceptance of such a change.
